creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
In case the maintainer cannot maintain this port anymore, I can do it: since I am the maintainer for maxima, if he wants or needs to drop maintainership I am probably well suited to take his place.

Of course, I do not want to take his place if he wants to stay maintainer and I leave precedence to Kurt if he wants to take maintainership as he is submitting the patch.
